name: Bali
description: The Island of the Gods enchants with jungle-clad rice terraces, sacred temples, and world-class surf breaks.

name: Phuket
description: Thailand's largest island with powder-white beaches, emerald waters, and legendary island-hopping.

name: Maldives
description: Crystal-clear lagoons, vibrant coral reefs, and iconic overwater bungalows in the Indian Ocean.

name: Bangkok
description: Gold temples, chaotic street food markets, and rooftop bars in the city that never sleeps.

name: Singapore
description: A gleaming city-state of futuristic architecture, world-class hawker food, and tropical gardens.

name: Hanoi
description: Vietnam's ancient capital of tree-lined boulevards, French architecture, and intensely flavourful street food.

name: Halong Bay
description: Thousands of limestone karsts emerge from emerald waters in one of Asia's most spectacular wonders.

name: Chiang Mai
description: Northern Thailand's cultural capital with mountain sanctuaries, ancient temples, and night bazaars.

name: Luang Prabang
description: A serene UNESCO town of golden temples, saffron-robed monks, and turquoise waterfalls.

name: Palawan
description: The Philippines' crown jewel of limestone cliffs, secret lagoons, and world-class diving.

name: Lombok
description: Bali's quieter neighbour with volcanic peaks, sacred waterfalls, and pristine Gili Islands.

name: Komodo Island
description: Home to prehistoric Komodo dragons and the world's richest coral reefs.

name: Borneo
description: Earth's last great rainforest where wild orangutans swing through ancient trees.

name: Sri Lanka
description: Ancient rock fortresses, spice gardens, elephant safaris, and world-class surf breaks.

name: Bhutan
description: The Land of the Thunder Dragon — one of the world's last Shangri-Las.

name: Goa
description: India's sun-soaked coastline of golden beaches, Portuguese churches, and vibrant night markets.

name: Rajasthan
description: A kaleidoscope of maharaja palaces, desert dunes, and living royal heritage.

name: Kerala
description: India's most serene destination — backwaters, houseboat cruises, and ancient Ayurvedic healing.

name: Jaisalmer
description: The Golden City rises from the Thar Desert — a sandstone fort and Silk Road heritage.

name: Ladakh
description: The roof of the world — high-altitude passes, sapphire lakes, and ancient monasteries.

name: Agra
description: Home to the Taj Mahal — the world's most iconic monument to love, on the Yamuna riverbank.

name: Varanasi
description: The spiritual heart of India — ancient ghats on the Ganges where life and death meet.

name: Mumbai
description: India's maximum city — Bollywood glamour, colonial heritage, and extraordinary street food.

name: Andaman Islands
description: A remote Indian Ocean archipelago of pristine beaches, coral reefs, and colonial history.

name: Rishikesh
description: The yoga capital of the world — Himalayan foothills, sacred rivers, and adventure sports.

name: Tokyo
description: A mesmerising fusion of ultramodern skyscrapers, ancient temples, and the world's finest food culture.

name: Kyoto
description: Japan's ancient imperial capital with thousands of temples, zen gardens, and living geisha culture.

name: Osaka
description: Japan's kitchen — the most vibrant street food scene in Asia and irresistible city warmth.

name: Nara
description: Ancient Japan's first capital where sacred deer roam freely among thousand-year-old temples.

name: Hiroshima
description: A city of resilience and peace — rebuilt from atomic devastation into a modern symbol of hope.

name: Paris
description: The City of Light captivates with world-class art, cuisine, and timeless romance.

name: Rome
description: Millennia of history unfold across ancient ruins, Renaissance art, and vibrant street life.

name: Barcelona
description: Gaudi's surreal architecture, golden beaches, and electric nightlife in the Catalan capital.

name: Amsterdam
description: A city of canals, world-class museums, and liberal culture.

name: Prague
description: A fairy-tale medieval city of Gothic spires, art nouveau cafes, and legendary Czech beer.

name: Santorini
description: White-washed villages perched above a volcanic caldera with the world's most photographed sunsets.

name: Amalfi Coast
description: Dramatic cliffs plunge into turquoise waters along this UNESCO Italian coastline.

name: Dubrovnik
description: The Pearl of the Adriatic — a medieval walled city rising from crystal-clear waters.

name: Lisbon
description: Sunlit hills of azulejo tiles, melancholic fado music, and Europe's most underrated food scene.

name: Budapest
description: The Paris of the East — grand thermal baths, ruin bars, and one of Europe's most beautiful parliaments.

name: Vienna
description: Imperial grandeur, classical music, and legendary coffeehouse culture in the Habsburg city.

name: Edinburgh
description: A dramatic castle presides over this storied Scottish capital of literary legends and whisky bars.

name: Reykjavik
description: The world's northernmost capital — geysers, lava fields, and the aurora borealis.

name: Cappadocia
description: A dreamlike landscape of volcanic rock formations, cave dwellings, and floating balloons.

name: Istanbul
description: East meets West — minarets and cathedrals, spice bazaars and rooftop bars across two continents.

name: Porto
description: A romantic city of ancient bookshops, cliff-side port wine cellars, and spectacular tiles.

name: Seville
description: The soul of Andalusia — flamenco rhythms, Moorish palaces, and passionate street culture.

name: Swiss Alps
description: Europe's most dramatic mountain scenery with world-class ski resorts and pristine lakes.

name: Cinque Terre
description: Five photogenic fishing villages clinging to Ligurian cliffs above turquoise sea.

name: Bruges
description: A perfectly preserved medieval trading city of cobblestones, canals, and world-class chocolate.

name: Marrakech
description: A sensory explosion of spice markets, snake charmers, and labyrinthine medinas.

name: Cape Town
description: One of the world's most beautiful cities — mountains, ocean, vineyards, and vibrant culture.

name: Zanzibar
description: The Spice Island — Arabic architecture, Swahili culture, and Africa's most pristine beaches.

name: Serengeti
description: The greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth — millions of wildebeest across endless golden plains.

name: Cairo and Giza
description: Stand before the last of the Seven Wonders — ancient pyramids on the edge of Cairo's sprawl.

name: Namibia
description: Africa's most dramatic landscape — towering crimson dunes and some of the world's darkest skies.

name: Rwanda
description: Track endangered mountain gorillas in mist-shrouded volcanoes.

name: Seychelles
description: The most beautiful islands in the world — granite boulders and powder beaches.

name: Chefchaouen
description: The Blue Pearl of Morocco — a mountain town painted entirely in shades of azure.

name: Nairobi
description: Africa's most cosmopolitan city, steps from the legendary Masai Mara.

name: New York City
description: The city that never sleeps — cultures, cuisines, and iconic landmarks on a vertical island.

name: Machu Picchu
description: The lost city of the Incas rises in mountain mist — one of humanity's most breathtaking sites.

name: Rio de Janeiro
description: Atlantic beaches, jungle mountains, and Carnival energy collide in extraordinary beauty.

name: Patagonia
description: Earth's last great wilderness — jagged granite towers and calving glaciers.

name: Mexico City
description: One of the Americas' greatest cultural capitals — pyramids, museums, and extraordinary food.

name: Tulum
description: Ancient Mayan ruins gazing over turquoise Caribbean waters and secret underground cenotes.

name: Galapagos
description: Darwin's living laboratory where evolution unfolded in isolation.

name: Banff
description: Turquoise glacial lakes and snow-capped Rocky Mountain peaks in Canada's oldest national park.

name: Cartagena
description: A jewel of the Caribbean coast — colonial architecture, azure waters, and salsa rhythms.

name: Havana
description: A time capsule of crumbling colonial grandeur, vintage Chevrolets, and rum-soaked music.

name: Dubai
description: A city of superlatives — the tallest tower, largest mall, and boldest urban vision.

name: Petra
description: The rose-red city carved into sandstone cliffs — one of archaeology's greatest treasures.

name: Oman Muscat
description: The Middle East's most welcoming destination — grand mosques, wadis, and rolling dunes.

name: Doha
description: A skyline of extraordinary architecture rising from the Arabian Gulf.

name: Tel Aviv
description: A 24/7 Mediterranean city of extraordinary food, culture, and ancient port neighbourhood.

name: Kathmandu
description: Gateway to the Himalayas — ancient temples and the starting point for great mountain adventures.

name: Pokhara
description: Nepal's adventure capital — paragliding over mirror lakes with Annapurna as backdrop.

name: Everest Base Camp
description: The ultimate trekking challenge — reaching the foot of the world's highest mountain.

name: Sydney
description: Australia's glamorous harbour city — iconic architecture, golden beaches, and outdoor lifestyle.

name: Great Barrier Reef
description: The world's largest living structure — coral, colour, and over 1,500 species of fish.

name: New Zealand
description: The adventure capital of the world — fjords, glaciers, and every adrenaline sport imaginable.

name: Fiji
description: A true South Pacific paradise of 333 islands with warm people and soft coral reefs.

name: Jaipur
description: The Pink City — a UNESCO heritage town of rose-hued palaces, forts, and vibrant bazaars.

name: Udaipur
description: The City of Lakes — romance, royal palaces reflected in shimmering lake waters.

name: Hampi
description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site of surreal boulder landscapes and magnificent Vijayanagara ruins.

name: Delhi
description: India's capital — thousands of years of history across Mughal monuments and colonial boulevards.

name: Seoul
description: Ancient palaces beside K-pop boutiques and twenty-four-hour street food in relentless energy.

name: Mongolia
description: Vast open steppes where nomadic culture thrives and the night sky blazes with stars.

name: Dolomites
description: The most dramatic mountain scenery in the Alps — rose-tinted limestone towers.

name: Scottish Highlands
description: Europe's last great wilderness — misty glens, ancient castles, and legendary lochs.

name: Copenhagen
description: The world's most sustainable city — canal-side townhouses and the happiest people on Earth.

name: Bordeaux
description: The wine capital of the world — grand chateaux, underground cellars, and Atlantic dunes.

name: Azores
description: Portugal's volcanic island group in the mid-Atlantic — crater lakes, whale watching, hot springs.

name: Valletta
description: The world's smallest capital — a Baroque jewel of golden limestone crammed with history.

name: Tbilisi
description: A city of crumbling beauty — frescoed churches, outdoor wine culture, and Caucasus cuisine.

name: Buenos Aires
description: The Paris of South America — European architecture, world-class beef, and the soul of tango.

name: Hawaii Maui
description: The Valley Isle — volcanic landscapes, rainbow forests, and world-class surf beaches.

name: New Orleans
description: America's most unique city — Creole culture, jazz music, voodoo history, and extraordinary food.

name: Cusco
description: The ancient Inca capital high in the Andes — Spanish colonial splendour over living Incan culture.

name: Vancouver
description: A clean, vibrant city between ocean and mountains, with North America's finest Asian food.

name: Atacama Desert
description: Earth's driest place — coloured valleys, salt flats, and the world's best stargazing.

name: Amazon
description: The planet's great lung — teeming with biodiversity in the world's largest rainforest.

name: Sahara Desert
description: A vast ocean of golden dunes where total silence and infinite skies create profound perspective.

name: Ethiopia
description: Africa's most ancient civilization — rock-hewn churches and multi-coloured volcanic calderas.

name: Victoria Falls
description: The world's largest waterfall — a roaring curtain of water creating its own weather system.

name: Beirut
description: The Paris of the Middle East — a resilient, vibrant city of extraordinary food and Phoenician history.

name: Kathmandu Valley
description: A valley of three ancient city-kingdoms, each with stunning medieval architecture and living traditions.

name: Hoi An
description: A beautifully preserved trading port of yellow lanterns, ancient temples, and silk tailors.

name: Ubud
description: Bali's spiritual heart — a lush green town of yoga studios, healing traditions, and ancient dance.

name: Phnom Penh
description: Cambodia's fascinating capital on the Mekong — history, resilience, and rapid change.
